action.reasoning: Observation: iter 25 train_fp.py crashed due to RDKit implicit hydrogen error after molecule construction. The root cause: we didn't set explicit atom properties (formal charge, num Hs) and didn't call UpdatePropertyCache, so RDKit's internal valence calculation failed. Analysis: With proper atom properties and UpdatePropertyCache, the molecule will be sanitized correctly, enabling Morgan fingerprint computation. Fingerprints should significantly boost AP over the 0.025 linear baseline. Decision: Fix mol_utils.py to set atom properties and update property cache, ensuring robust molecule building. Write complete train_fp.py to precompute fingerprints, train a FeatureMLP on 2048-bit fingerprints for 25 epochs, and save best checkpoint. This will finally provide a strong, stable pipeline. Run training now (expected ~1.5-2h for fingerprint precomputation + training). Submit eval in next iteration as separate step.
